description.content: Find and explore places
Find places that match a query, location, category, chain, price, or radius. Returns a paged list of places ordered by the chosen sort.

query.description: Northeast corner of a bounding box (lat,lng).
Southwest corner of a bounding box (lat,lng).
Comma-separated Foursquare chain ids to include.
Comma-separated Foursquare chain ids to exclude.
Restrict to places open at a time in DOWTHHMM format (e.g., "1T2130").
Comma-separated list of fields to include in each result.

response.name: A page of matching places.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Retrieve attributes for a specific place
Retrieve details for a specific place by fsq_place_id.

query.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Photos associated with a place
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
User tips associated with a place
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Type-ahead search for places, addresses, and geographies
Return type-ahead suggestions for places, addresses, and geographies.

response.name: Autocomplete suggestions.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Resolve a coordinate to the most likely place (Place Snap)
Place Snap. Given a device coordinate (and optional accuracy), return the most likely places the user is currently located at, ordered by likelihood.

query.description: Altitude in meters above the WGS84 ellipsoid.
Optional string matched against candidate place names.

response.name: Candidate places for the supplied location.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Match an external POI record to a Foursquare place
Match an external POI record (name + address) to the canonical Foursquare place, returning the fsq_place_id and a match_score.

query.description: (Required) Name of the place to match.
Latitude,longitude pair to disambiguate the match.

response.name: A matched place with confidence score.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Natural-language place search with justifications
Natural-language place search. Returns ranked places that answer a free-form question, each with justifications explaining the match.

query.description: (Required) Natural language query (e.g., "cheap cafes in Williamsburg").

response.name: Ranked, justified places answering the query.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The Foursquare Places API provides global access to over 100 million points of interest (POI) for place search, details, autocomplete, geotagging (Place Snap), place matching, natural-language Ask search, and photos/tips. All requests target the current host https://places-api.foursquare.com, authenticate with a Service Key as a Bearer token, and must send the X-Places-Api-Version header. This OpenAPI describes the most commonly used endpoints; refer to the official documentation for the complete and authoritative reference.
